constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider evidence remains upstream and non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates completion, execution, worker identity, chain continuity, and output hashes before result capture.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output is captured as evidence but not granted certification authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Result captured and returned events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Result quality evaluation is not implemented.
Failure analysis, reflection, and self-improvement remain out of scope.
